name: governed-second-brain
description: Bob's Big Brain — the governed team brain: cited recall, hash-chained receipts. ONE plugin, two modes. Local (default): turn your own files into cited (qmd://) memory with deterministic governance and a tamper-evident SHA-256 hash-chained audit trail, in-process with no runtime network after one-time native dependency provisioning. Team (set TEAMKB_API_URL): query your team's single governed brain over the tailnet with a per-user token.

governed-brain.name: governed-brain
governed-brain.description: Bob's Big Brain — ONE plugin, two modes. Local (default): an in-process governed brain over your own files (~/.teamkb); first start provisions two lockfile-pinned native modules, then runtime is local. Team (set TEAMKB_API_URL): a dependency-free remote proxy to your team's single governed brain over the tailnet, with a per-user token.
